page.title: Fairline Targa 12m: Best Boat in Marbella for Fast coastal day cruising

data.meta_description: Discover why the Fairline Targa 12m is best for fast coastal day cruising in Marbella. 10 pax, 12m, departs Puerto Banús with skipper & drinks included.
data.summary: The Fairline Targa 12m is our top pick for speed-focused day trips along the Costa del Sol. With a 12m length, 10-person capacity, and departures from Puerto Banús, it delivers thrills without sacrificing comfort.
key_facts: 12m Fairline Targa, 10 pax, departs Puerto Banús
Designed for fast coastal day cruising – ideal for Marbella to Estepona or Cabopino runs
Includes licensed skipper, fuel, soft drinks, beer, wine, cava, snacks, insurance, IVA
Open-bow layout with sun pads and sociable cockpit seating
Pricing on request via WhatsApp – contact us for a custom quote
Top speed around 30 knots (subject to conditions and load)
Perfect for groups wanting a sporty, agile charter without the superyacht formality

faq.q: How many people can the Fairline Targa 12m hold?
faq.a: The Fairline Targa 12m accommodates up to 10 passengers, including the licensed skipper. This makes it ideal for medium-sized groups – families, friends, or small celebrations.

faq.q: Where does the Fairline Targa 12m depart from?
faq.a: All our Fairline Targa 12m charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. That puts you minutes from the coast's best anchorages: Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the Marbella Marina area.

faq.q: What is the top speed of the Fairline Targa 12m?
faq.a: The Fairline Targa 12m can reach approximately 30 knots in good conditions. Actual speed depends on sea state, load, and weather. It's built for performance – expect a fast, exhilarating ride.

faq.q: What is included in the Fairline Targa 12m charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, safety equipment, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. Spanish IVA (21%) is also included. There are no hidden extras.

faq.q: How do I book the Fairline Targa 12m?
faq.a: Pricing is on request. Contact us via WhatsApp (link on our site) with your preferred date, duration, and group size. We'll confirm availability and send a custom quote within hours.

faq.q: Is the Fairline Targa 12m suitable for a day trip to Estepona?
faq.a: Absolutely. The Targa's speed means you can reach Estepona (about 12 NM from Puerto Banús) in 25–30 minutes. Spend a few hours there, then cruise back along the coast – perfect for a fast coastal day cruise.

faq.q: Does the Fairline Targa 12m have a sun deck?
faq.a: Yes, the Targa has a large sun pad on the foredeck and comfortable seating in the cockpit. It's a sporty boat but still offers plenty of space to relax and soak up the Marbella sun.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food and drink on the Fairline Targa 12m?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring additional food or drinks. Our standard inclusions cover the basics, but you can supplement with your own. Just let us know in advance if you need a cooler or extra storage.

data.body_html:
If you want speed, style, and a proper open-bow day boat without the formality of a superyacht, the Fairline Targa 12m is the best boat in Marbella for fast coastal day cruising. Built by British yard Fairline, this 12-metre sports cruiser combines performance with practicality – and at 30 knots, it gets you to the best anchorages fast. Departing from Puerto Banús, it's our go-to recommendation for groups who want to cover ground, feel the wind, and still enjoy a comfortable day on the water. Read on to see why the Boat Rental Marbella team rates it so highly.

Why the Fairline Targa 12m is best for fast coastal day cruising

The Fairline Targa 12m is designed for one thing: covering distance quickly while keeping everyone comfortable. Its deep-V hull cuts through chop efficiently, and with twin engines pushing it to around 30 knots, you can reach Estepona from Puerto Banús in under 30 minutes. That matters when you want to maximise time at anchor, not transit. The open-bow layout and sociable cockpit mean you're never far from the action, and the sun pads forward are perfect for a post-swim nap. For a fast coastal day cruise along the Costa del Sol, this boat is hard to beat.

Fairline Targa 12m vs other boats in our fleet

Our fleet includes everything from the compact Mariah SX21 to the 29-metre Ferretti 94. The Targa sits in the middle: bigger and faster than a bowrider, but more agile and less formal than a flybridge. Compared to the Azimut 39 (11 pax, 12.5m), the Targa is sportier and more responsive. Against the Mangusta 80 (12 pax, 24m), it's obviously smaller but far more fun for a small group wanting a fast, hands-on experience. If you want speed without the size, the Targa is your match.

What's included on a Fairline Targa 12m charter

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, safety equipment, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. Spanish IVA (21%) is also included. You don't need to worry about hidden costs – just turn up at Puerto Banús and enjoy. For pricing, contact us via WhatsApp – we'll tailor a quote to your group size and desired duration.

Best destinations for a fast day cruise from Puerto Banús

With the Targa's speed, you can reach several top spots in under an hour:

  • Cala del Faro – 4 NM, 10 minutes. A quiet cove with clear water, ideal for a quick swim stop.
  • Cala Cortés – 6 NM, 15 minutes. Sheltered bay with beach club vibes.
  • Marbella Marina – 2 NM, 5 minutes. Perfect for a lunch stop at a waterfront restaurant.
  • Estepona – 12 NM, 25–30 minutes. Charming old town and a long promenade.
  • Cabopino – 8 NM, 20 minutes. Dunes and a naturist beach – very popular.
  • Sotogrande – 20 NM, 40 minutes. Luxury marina and polo country.

For a full day, combine two or three destinations. The Targa's speed means you can do Estepona, Cala Cortés, and Marbella Marina without rushing.

Fairline Targa 12m specifications

SpecValue
Length12 m
Beam3.8 m
Passengers10 (incl. skipper)
Top speed~30 knots (conditions dependent)
Departure portPuerto Banús, Marbella
InclusionsSkipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, IVA
PricingOn request via WhatsApp

Who is the Fairline Targa 12m best for?

This boat suits groups of up to 10 who want a sporty, fast day out – not a slow cruise. It's ideal for stag or hen parties, family outings, or friends celebrating a birthday. If you like the idea of covering several anchorages in one day, or you want to feel the speed without the formality of a larger yacht, the Targa is the best choice. It's also a great option for those who've done the big-superyacht thing and want something more hands-on.

How to book the Fairline Targa 12m

Ready to experience the best boat in Marbella for fast coastal day cruising? Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, duration, and group size. We'll confirm availability and send a custom quote. All charters depart from Puerto Banús. For other options, browse our full boat rental fleet.

Frequently asked questions

How many people can the Fairline Targa 12m hold?

The Fairline Targa 12m accommodates up to 10 passengers, including the licensed skipper. This makes it ideal for medium-sized groups – families, friends, or small celebrations.

Where does the Fairline Targa 12m depart from?

All our Fairline Targa 12m charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. That puts you minutes from the coast's best anchorages: Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the Marbella Marina area.

What is the top speed of the Fairline Targa 12m?

The Fairline Targa 12m can reach approximately 30 knots in good conditions. Actual speed depends on sea state, load, and weather. It's built for performance – expect a fast, exhilarating ride.

What is included in the Fairline Targa 12m charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, safety equipment, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. Spanish IVA (21%) is also included. There are no hidden extras.

How do I book the Fairline Targa 12m?

Pricing is on request. Contact us via WhatsApp (link on our site) with your preferred date, duration, and group size. We'll confirm availability and send a custom quote within hours.

Is the Fairline Targa 12m suitable for a day trip to Estepona?

Absolutely. The Targa's speed means you can reach Estepona (about 12 NM from Puerto Banús) in 25–30 minutes. Spend a few hours there, then cruise back along the coast – perfect for a fast coastal day cruise.

Does the Fairline Targa 12m have a sun deck?

Yes, the Targa has a large sun pad on the foredeck and comfortable seating in the cockpit. It's a sporty boat but still offers plenty of space to relax and soak up the Marbella sun.

Can I bring my own food and drink on the Fairline Targa 12m?

Yes, you are welcome to bring additional food or drinks. Our standard inclusions cover the basics, but you can supplement with your own. Just let us know in advance if you need a cooler or extra storage.
